item.creategarnished.garnishment_book.to: A _guide book_ for the Create: Garnished Reworked mod.
item.creategarnished.pressurised_hatchet: Allows for _certain mobs_ to drop _extra or additional items_ upon death. Can be powered with _Air_ _Pressure_ from a _Backtank_
Will convert the given log to a _stripped state_.
_No_ _Durability_ will be used. Instead, _Air_ _pressure_ is drained from the Tank
item.creategarnished.creative_pressurise: Allows for _certain mobs_ to drop _extra or additional items_ upon death. This item will not consume _durability or air pressure_ upon use.
Will convert the given log to a _stripped state_.
creategarnished.text.mod_loaded.reliquar: Reliquary Reincarnations is loaded, drop is replaced or removed
item.creategarnished.glazed_monument_med: A _spiky meal_ that improves your lung capacity.
Has a chance to provide the _Conduit Power_ status effect for _1 minute_. Provides the _Water Breathing_ status effect for _3 minutes_.
item.creategarnished.sllimy.tooltip.summ: A _sticky treat_ provided through a jar.
item.creategarnished.sllimy.tooltip.beha: Has a chance to provide the _Oozing_ status effect for _60 seconds_.
item.creategarnished.fiery_sllimy.toolti: A _sticky treat_ provided through a jar.
Has a chance to provide the _Oozing_ status effect for _60 seconds_ and _Fire Resistance_ status effect for _30 seconds_.
block.creategarnished.birch_sap_log.tool: Has config options to _control how Birch Sap is handled_.
Provides _Bottle of Birch Sap_ before needing to regenerate after _a brief period of time_.
block.creategarnished.creative_birch_sap: Provides _Bottle of Birch Sap_ for an _infinite_ amount of uses.
item.creategarnished.candy_wrapping.tool: Dyes the wrapper _similar to leather armor_.
item.creategarnished.elven_tea.tooltip.s: The perfect drink to sneak up on friends- _Out of Sight_ and _Out of Mind_.
item.creategarnished.eggnog.tooltip.summ: Think of it as a _miniature Milk Bucket_, but perhaps less _fit for human consumption_.
item.creategarnished.mysterious_volt_bot: _Strange and purple volts_ contained within a bottle.
Release a _small area of voltage_ to inflict enemies. This also inflicts yourself with the _Volt Struck_ status effect.
If the user is inflicted with _Volt Struck_, than they might _spread their condition to other entities_. Certain mobs may drop _special items_ upon death during this event.
item.creategarnished.pumpkin_spicy_fritt: A _cozy snack_ for the autumn season.
Has a chance to provide the _Soothing_ status effect for _3 minutes_.
item.creategarnished.royal_cider.tooltip: A drink fit for a monarch! And just like a monarch, _everyone will know who you are_.
Places down _decorative glass of Royal Cider_.
item.creategarnished.slimy_cobwob.toolti: A _stitched together treat_ probably prepared last minute for a party.
Has a chance to provide the _Weaving_ status effect for _2 minutes_.
item.creategarnished.sprinters_tea.toolt: The perfect drink for swift travel- _Refreshing_ and _Rejuvenating_.
item.creategarnished.sweet_tea.tooltip.s: The perfect drink for a break- _Sweet_ and _Soothing_.
item.creategarnished.volt_skewer.tooltip: Some relatively _sour and tender_ meat on a stick that might _constitute an OSHA violation_.
Provides the _Resistance_ status effect for _1 minute_.
item.creategarnished.wrapped_candy.toolt: Contains a _secret status effect_ wrapped inside!
Dyes the wrapped candy _similar to leather armor_.

If a basin has _potion contents_ within, right-clicking on it with a _wrapped candy lacking potion contents_ will drain it of _250mb_ and grant that potion to the wrapped candy. However, the effects will be _kept hidden_.
advancement.creategarnished.root.title: Welcome to Create: Garnished
advancement.creategarnished.dejojotheaws:
Even in the rework, he lives on - Thank you, Dejojo

Find Wild Ginger Roots in a Jungle

advancement.creategarnished.obtain_pine_: Find Pine Nuts growing on a tree in a Taiga
advancement.creategarnished.obtain_sweet: Create Sweet Tea to gain Regeneration temporarily upon consumption
advancement.creategarnished.obtain_garli: Find Garlic sprouting out of the ground in a Taiga
advancement.creategarnished.obtain_royal: Create Royal Cider to assist in fueling your Blaze Burners

advancement.creategarnished.obtain_hazel: Find Hazelnuts growing on a tree in a Birch Forest
advancement.creategarnished.obtain_choco: Create Chocolate Truffles by compacting Chocolate with Cocoa Beans and Milk
advancement.creategarnished.obtain_birch: Process Birch Sap into Birch Syrup

advancement.creategarnished.obtain_churc: Create a Churchkhela by combining Almonds, Flour, and Beetroot Juice
advancement.creategarnished.killed_using: Relieve a mob of it's internal (or external) parts
advancement.creategarnished.elder_guardi: Tear an elder guardian's spikes out of it's body to impale your enemies
advancement.creategarnished.kill_1000_cr:
Defeat 1000 mobs that dropped unique loot while using a Pressurized Hatchet

advancement.creategarnished.obtain_mint_: Find both Wild Mint and Wild Peppermint in a Taiga and Plains respectively
